acceptance_criteria:
1. gemini extensions link ~/01_projects/claude-mem-gemini/gemini-extension exits without error
2. Starting a Gemini CLI session shows claude-mem context injected at startup (non-empty additionalContext)
3. Using any tool in the session creates an observable entry at http://localhost:37777/
4. Asking Gemini to call the mcp-search 'search' tool returns results from the memory database
5. Session exit triggers summarize hook (check worker logs at ~/.claude-mem/logs/)
description: Install the gemini-extension locally via 'gemini extensions link' and run a smoke test to confirm context injection, tool observation capture, and MCP search tools all work end-to-end in a real Gemini CLI session.
design: Commands: (1) gemini extensions link ~/01_projects/claude-mem-gemini/gemini-extension (2) gemini (start session) (3) Use a tool, check http://localhost:37777/ (4) 'search for recent gemini work' via MCP (5) exit, check worker log. Rollback: gemini extensions unlink gemini-mem.
notes: POC stub at /tmp/gemini-mem-poc/ was created for pre-validation of hook schema. Extension is at gemini-extension/. Worker must be running (auto-starts via SessionStart hook). [Generated by /beadify]
title: Live validation: link Gemini extension and smoke-test
